```python
labelmapVolumeNode = getNode("label")

seg.CreateClosedSurfaceRepresentation()
slicer.mrmlScene.RemoveNode(labelmapVolumeNode)
```

The last line is optional. It removes the original labelmap volume so that the same information is not shown twice.

        """Create a model node that renders an (N, 3) array as a point cloud."""
        vtkPoints = vtk.vtkPoints()
        for p in points:

        node.CreateDefaultDisplayNodes()
        dn = node.GetDisplayNode()
        dn.SetColor(*color)
        dn.SetRepresentation(dn.PointsRepresentation)
        dn.SetPointSize(5)

```python
slicer.util.loadSegmentation("c:/tmp/tmp/Segmentation.nrrd")

colorNode = slicer.util.loadColorTable('c:/tmp/tmp/Segmentation-label_ColorTable.ctbl')
```

```python
labelmapVolumeNode = getNode("label")
seg = slicer.mrmlScene.AddNewNodeByClass("vtkMRMLSegmentationNode")

seg.CreateClosedSurfaceRepresentation()
slicer.mrmlScene.RemoveNode(labelmapVolumeNode)
```

The last line is optional. It removes the original labelmap volume so that the same information is not shown twice.

```python
def onApply(self):
    if not self.scriptedEffect.confirmCurrentSegmentVisible():
        return
    try:
        masterImageData = self.scriptedEffect.sourceVolumeImageData()
        modifierLabelmap = self.scriptedEffect.defaultModifierLabelmap()
        originalImageToWorldMatrix = vtk.vtkMatrix4x4()
        modifierLabelmap.GetImageToWorldMatrix(originalImageToWorldMatrix)
        min = self.scriptedEffect.doubleParameter("MinimumThreshold")
        max = self.scriptedEffect.doubleParameter("MaximumThreshold")
        self.scriptedEffect.saveStateForUndo()
        thresh = vtk.vtkImageThreshold()
        thresh.SetInputData(masterImageData)
        thresh.ThresholdBetween(min, max)
        thresh.SetInValue(1)
        thresh.SetOutValue(0)
        thresh.SetOutputScalarType(modifierLabelmap.GetScalarType())
        thresh.Update()
        modifierLabelmap.DeepCopy(thresh.GetOutput())
```
